channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Furniture dumped at top of Holmdale Terrace, 10th April
item.description:
Furniture dumped at top of road behind Stamford Hill Station. Please remove.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Park, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bike with flat tire, 10th April
item.description:
Abandoned bike with flat tire

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Dante Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial rubbish collection., 10th April
item.description:
Biffa truck collecting commercial rubbish, beeping and flashing lights whilst parked in a residential road after 23:00 at night.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Haddon Grove, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken pedestrian safety barrier, 10th April
item.description:
Looks like it’s been hit by a car. Looks a bit dangerous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 9 cavendish Road, 10th April
item.description:
Hi - I reported this yesterday but basically someone dumped all their rubbish in and next to our wheelie bin; and this is now attracting animals and homeless people who have gone through though all our bins in search of something valuable. Look at the state of this!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cavendish Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th April
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Heron Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another sofa!, 10th April
item.description:
It seems as if people have the idea that this is the place to dump their old furniture. We need to catch someone and fine them - ideally a lot of money! Or CCTV?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pitfield Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped furniture and household waste, 10th April
item.description:
Corner of Sutherland Road and Findon Road N9.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sutherland Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead hedgehog, 10th April
item.description:
Dead hedgehog on front driveway of 70 Clinton Avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clinton Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste, tree stumps, mud, 10th April
item.description:
64 ridge way is under renovation. They are dumping mounds of mud etc in the entrance on ridge avenue to a side access. Mud has been there for a while. They have added to it with more dirt and tree stumps.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ridge Avenue, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Exposed electric box on queens road, 10th April
item.description:
Exposed electrical box on queens road. Been like this for a bout 1 week . On McDonald's side of road heading away from junction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queens Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chest drawers dropped on the communal hallway, 10th April
item.description:
2 chest drawers have been dropped on the 2 floor in the middle of the communal hallway, one is blocking the access to the roof, the other one is on a side, first item has been dropped 10 days ago and the second one just 2 days ago in the middle of the night.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ledbury Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytioping, 10th April
item.description:
A lot of junk etc in two places on the same side of the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gilda Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped shopping trolley, 10th April
item.description:
Been there a couple of days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Oldbury Close, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wall collapsed opposite 62/64 Elm road, 10th April
item.description:
This wall collapse has been reported several times. The bricks are across the pathway prohibiting wheelchair and pram access. The council came and put those yellow cones around a month ago - they frequently fall over (as shown) or end up blown in the road. The bricks need to be removed permenantly and the wall made secure

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elm Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of high weeds and pigeon pooo on pavement, 10th April
item.description:
There is loads of weeds that need removing on Ranmore path u can’t miss them I reported this before and it wasn’t done your staff can’t seem to locate Ranmore path !!!! Very strange !.PLEASE REMIVE THE WEEDS AND SWEEP THE PIGEON POO AWAY AS ITS HAZARD AND DANGEROUS
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ranmore Path, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox on Silwood Street, 10th April
item.description:
There is a dead fox on Silwood Street opposite Chamberlain Court.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Silwood Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blanchedowne, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th April
